subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance and who cleaveth fast to the cord of grace! Hearken unto the call of this Wronged One Who hath made mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و المتمسک بحبل الفضل اسمع ندآء المظلوم الذی ذکرک فی
